module.name: gallery
module.description: Beautifully arranges a set of images and captions in a grid.

snippet.label: Image Gallery
snippet.text: <!-- @gallery columns: 2 --> ![Result 1](https://via.placeholder.com/400x200) Plot result with the proposed method <!-- @ --> ![Result 2](https://via.placeholder.com/400x200) Plot result with the conventional method <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Arranges images in an even grid.
